title: ehretia macrophylla var. macrophylla
intro: Ehretia macrophylla var. macrophylla, also known as the large-leaved ehretia or mountain mahogany, is a plant species that belongs to the family Oleaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its leaves, bark, and roots, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ehretia macrophylla var. macrophylla include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Ehretia macrophylla var. macrophylla include infusions and decoctions made from the leaves, bark, and roots, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
